name: Cloud Popper (Toddler/Early Years Game)
short_description: A point-and-click cloud bursting game developed specifically with Toddlers and Early Years in mind. Keeps your little one distracted for long enough for you use the bathroom and make a brew!- Large Cursor - Controller Compatible - No Reading Required
detailed_description:
FOR ALL TODDLER PARENTS EVERYWHERE.

Cloud Popper is here to bring you a moment of peace, keeping curious minds entertained searching for what might be under the next cloud, and developing point-and-click accuracy(via mouse or controller).

This simple game allows even the smallest kids to play so they can copy you/your partner without frustration at the controls not working for them.

Gameplay is focussed on hovering over the clouds to highlight them and popping the clouds by clicking them and uncover the hidden image below, once all of the clouds have been popped there is a reload button(loads new clouds to pop) or back button(return to main menu shown in image).

Cloud Popper is a solution to in-browser or keyboard smash style games causing absolute chaos on the PC/machine as soon as chore began, the exit game button is therefore small and tucked away(see above), hopefully not too appealing to little hands!
